prompt: Remove the segmentation masks and bounding boxes from the image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Remove all overlaid computer vision annotations, including the colored segmentation masks with white outlines, the green bounding boxes, and the text labels (e.g., 'person 1.00', 'bicycle 0.97'), to restore the image to its original unannotated appearance.
objects: colored segmentation masks (should not be present)
green bounding boxes (should not be present)
